vaultType.description: Vault family for the `/v3/evk/vaults` EVK surface.

governor.description: Latest governor admin if available; falls back to creator.

governorAdmin.description: Latest governor admin if available; falls back to creator.

supplyCap.description: Resolved supply cap as a bigint string in underlying asset units.

borrowCap.description: Resolved borrow cap as a bigint string in underlying asset units.

totalShares.description: Raw vault share supply as a bigint string.

totalAssets.description: Raw underlying asset amount as a bigint string.

totalBorrowed.description: Raw borrowed asset amount as a bigint string.

totalCash.description: Raw cash amount as a bigint string.

cash.description: Raw cash amount as a bigint string.

interestRate.description: Raw contract interest-rate value as a bigint string.

interestAccumulator.description: Raw contract interest accumulator as a bigint string.

accumulatedFees.description: Raw accumulated fee amount as a bigint string.

exchangeRate.description: Raw exchange rate as a bigint string.

totalSupplyUsd.description: Market USD number for total supplied assets.

totalBorrowsUsd.description: Market USD number for total borrowed assets.

supplyApy.description: Public supply APY as a percent number.

borrowApy.description: Public borrow APY as a percent number.
